title: Public Login Portal Detected
description: A public authentication surface was detected on the external perimeter.
impact: Externally accessible login portals are high-value targets for password attacks, MFA bypass attempts, and vulnerability research.
likelihood: Medium due to common targeting of internet-facing authentication surfaces.
recommendations: Validate MFA, lockout, SSO, and recovery workflows.
Confirm versioning and exposure of the underlying platform.
Review whether the portal should be internet-facing.
